signals.headline: XRP Reclaims #3 Market Cap Spot & Ripple Unveils Quantum-Resistant XRPL Roadmap | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
XRP Reclaims #3 Market Cap Spot & Ripple Unveils Quantum-Resistant XRPL Roadmap | YES | HIGH**  
Ripple announced on April 21, 2026, that XRP surpassed BNB to become the third-largest cryptocurrency by market cap, driven by record $65.89 million in spot ETF inflows for April 2026, alongside a detailed four-phase roadmap to make the XRP Ledger quantum-resistant by 2028 for enhanced institutional se
matched_markets: XRP Up or Down - April 22, 9:20PM-9:25PM ET

signals.headline: SEC Schedules CLARITY Act Roundtable on April 16 for Crypto Regulation Clarity | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
SEC Schedules CLARITY Act Roundtable on April 16 for Crypto Regulation Clarity | YES | MED**  
The SEC announced an April 16, 2026, roundtable on the CLARITY Act to determine digital asset oversight, potentially resolving Ripple's regulatory issues; committee markup possible week of April 27 if noticed by Friday.[4][7]

signals.headline: XRP ETFs Lead Altcoin Inflows with 6-Day Streak Amid Geopolitical Tensions | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
XRP ETFs Lead Altcoin Inflows with 6-Day Streak Amid Geopolitical Tensions | YES | HIGH**  
US XRP-linked ETFs absorbed $55.39 million last week (second-best in 2026), topping altcoins like Solana ($35.17M) as institutions rotate beyond Bitcoin ($996M) and Ethereum ($276M) amid US-Iran Strait of Hormuz tensions and April 22 ceasefire deadline.[6]
matched_markets: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?
XRP Up or Down - April 22, 9:20PM-9:25PM ET
